seoTitle: Tamrookum vs Tanah Merah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tamrookum and Tanah Merah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tamrookum vs Tanah Merah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tamrookum and Tanah Merah.
heading: Tamrookum vs Tanah Merah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tamrookum, Queensland and Tanah Merah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tamrookum has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Tanah Merah (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tamrookum or Tanah Merah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tamrookum has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Tanah Merah scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tamrookum scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Tanah Merah scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tamrookum or Tanah Merah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tamrookum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
